📊 Time Series Forecasting — Retail Sales Demand
Generated: 2026-03-18 22:53

Time Series Forecasting for Retail Sales Demand

End-to-end forecasting pipeline: EDA → Modelling → Evaluation → 30-Day Forecast

Contents 1. Executive Summary 2. Exploratory Data Analysis 3. Model Evaluation 4. 30-Day Forecast

1. Executive Summary

Historical retail sales data was cleaned, analysed for trend and seasonality, and used to train five forecasting models. The best-performing model — XGBoost (lowest RMSE on held-out 30-day test window) — was used to generate the final 30-day demand forecast.

Best Model: RMSE = 16.6634  |  MAE = 13.7318  |  MAPE = 8.44%
